title: Small in Stature, Big in Heart

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower is appearing on Mayano Top
Gun's UmaTube livestream. As her trainer, I come
along to offer support.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, viewers! As you may already know, we
have a special guest here today!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm Nishino Flower. It's a pleasure to be here!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: It's Flower! She's such a cutie!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: Do your best, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Seems like everyone's thrilled to have you here,
Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-wow... There are so many people watching!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's get this party started! I had my viewers
send in messages for us to read out today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Our first message comes from the user
"DandyFish"! They said, "I messed up big time at
work and could use some encouragement."

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Copy that, DandyFish! I can see that you're
running on empty, but I'll help refuel you on
happiness until your tank's full again!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Go, go, DandyFish! The sky's the limit, and I'm
your copilot! Let's take off!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aaall right! Your turn, Flower! Go ahead and give
DandyFish some support!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Me?! O-oh, um... Thank you for writing in,
DandyFish!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what kind of work you do or what
kind of mistake you made but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've heard people say that making mistakes is
proof that you're putting yourself out there and
taking on something outside your comfort zone.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So I'm sure you only made a mistake because you
were giving it your all to finish a tough task.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Just knowing that about you, I can tell you're a
very hard worker, and I really respect that about
you!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: Omigosh... She's an actual angel!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm gonna cry. That was like a hug but with
words.

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: I want to receive some encouragement too!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: Spoil me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Flower, you're amazing! I've never seen the
comment section so full of emotion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The viewers are whipped into a frenzy by Nishino
Flower's genuine compassion, and the livestream
moves along swimmingly.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer! What did you think about my
livestream with Mayano? I hope I didn't seem
weird...
choice_data_list:
I wouldn't mind the occasional word of
encouragement myself.

I wouldn't mind the occasional word of
encouragement myself.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer! What did you think about my
livestream with Mayano? I hope I didn't seem
weird...
choice_data_list:
I wouldn't mind the occasional word of
encouragement myself.

I wouldn't mind the occasional word of
encouragement myself.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you really think so? I'm so glad!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, I was thinking that maybe I could start
doing my own livestreams if there's a demand for
it. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if I can bring joy to people through my
encouragement, then why not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering the beyond enthusiastic reception
Nishino Flower received today, letting her do
solo livestreams might crash UmaTube's servers!
choice_data_list:
I think people will receive the most
encouragement from seeing your races.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You're right! I can warm everyone's hearts with
my running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and Mayano Top Gun's archived
stream later becomes something of a holy grail
for those seeking a source of encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whaaat?! You want me to encourage you too,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! I'll pull out all the stops to motivate
you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You always work so hard around the clock,
Trainer! You're the type of grown-up I truly
respect!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that you do so much for my sake inspires
me to work hard, too. So...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You get a gold star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The immense warmth contained within Nishino
Flower's heart threatens to swallow my entire
being whole...
